creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Beñat Gonzalez Etxepare from comment #0)

Commit to quarterly branch is done to fix problem (build error, runtime error, security vulnerability, and other bug). According to the change log of 1.0.0, this release is new feature release. And 1.0.1 is bugfix release of 1.0.0. So I don't think this update need to be merged to quarterly branch. But if you think it should be then please let me know.
